title: andinocleome limoneolens
intro: Andinocleome limoneolens, also known as the yellow cleome, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the Cleomaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been shown to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and combat infections. The health benefits of Andinocleome limoneolens include its potential to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Herbal preparations of Andinocleome limoneolens can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat a range of ailments, including digestive issues and skin conditions.
